problem id: 13f76716
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(4) XOR SHL(3)

examples:
  00110111 -> 11001011
  10010111 -> 11000001
  01111001 -> 01011111
  11111010 -> 01111111
  01001011 -> 11101100
  11111110 -> 00011111
  00000100 -> 01100000
  00111010 -> 01110011
  11101111 -> 10000110

query: 01000101
predicted answer: 01111100
